description: Letter from a man of communal standing, perhaps Daniel b. Azarya (1051-1062) bestowing the title 'Hod Ha-Zeqenim' upon the worthy elder and physician Avraham Ha-Kohen, ca. 1055. The author refers to his own decree to the Jewish community on recto, line 14: “I issued the decree (nishtevan) to my lord the Shaykh Abu l-Faraj, may God bless him, and he read it, and proclaimed it to the [congregation]."
description_he: מכתב מאיש עמדה קהילתית, אולי דניאל בן עזרא (1051–1062), המעניק את התואר 'הוד הזקנים' לזקן הנכבד והרופא אברהם הכהן, בערך 1055.
